issues.detail: The skill only demonstrates happy path examples and does not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Serverless index with namespaced metadata upsert
scenarios.rationale: Baseline often misses the serverless spec shape and namespace API; treatment uses createIndex with spec.serverless and index.namespace().upsert with rich metadata exactly as the skill shows.

scenarios.name: Filtered semantic search for RAG
scenarios.rationale: Baseline filters in JS or misuses operators; treatment uses the $eq/$gte filter operators on the query call and pipes matches into an OpenAI completion per the skill's RAG example.
